// SLIDE 03 — NEEDS-VISUAL

bond-duration-pricer — B03

NEEDS-VISUAL → static - no pattern fitsShould show: a static title card or plain text slide

The script discounts each semi-annual coupon and the face value back from each period. Modified duration divides Macaulay by 1 plus the semi-annual yield. Price at 5% is $707, at 6...

NARRATION

Beat B03 in reel bond-duration-pricer is missing its Remotion animation. The concept — The script discounts each semi-annual coupon and the face value back from each period. Modified duration divides Macaulay by 1 plus the semi-annual yield. Price at 5% is $707, at 6. // SLIDE 08 — NEEDS-VISUAL

capm-alpha-calculator — B03

NEEDS-VISUAL → static - no pattern fitsShould show: a static title card or plain text slide

The script runs log-return OLS for each window, extracts beta and R-squared, and computes CAPM expected return as rf plus beta times ERP. The alpha gap is actual minus expected.

NARRATION

Beat B03 in reel capm-alpha-calculator is missing its Remotion animation. The concept — The script runs log-return OLS for each window, extracts beta and R-squared, and computes CAPM expected return as rf plus beta times ERP. The alpha gap is actual minus expected..
